name: SourceForge
description: SourceForge — Legacy OSS project hosting platform with Git/SVN repositories, forums, and download statistics.

seo.title: SourceForge — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: SourceForge: SourceForge — Legacy OSS project hosting platform with Git/SVN repositories, forums, and download statistics.

when_to_use: Legacy OSS hosting with Git/SVN and download stats
Project forums and mailing lists for OSS communities
Download tracking and analytics for distributed software
Archive and distribution platform for open-source tools

pros: Supports Git, SVN, Mercurial in one place
cons: Reputation damaged by past bundled-installer scandal
UI and UX feel stuck in 2010
Developers prefer GitHub/GitLab for everything new
review.verdict: A distribution channel with reach but baggage — useful as a mirror, not a primary home.
review.best_for: Legacy OSS projects mirroring releases to reach old-school Windows/Linux users.
review.not_for: New projects starting fresh — GitHub or Codeberg are clearly better.
